title: I tested every AI writing tool. Only 3 are worth your time
post:
I spent 3 months testing every AI writing tool on the market. Most are garbage. Here's what actually works:

1. Claude: Best for long-form content that needs to think. The writing quality is genuinely good—not just grammatically correct but stylistically sound.

2. Jasper: Best for marketing teams. Templates and workflows actually make sense for content production. Enterprise features are mature.

3. Copy.ai: Best for quick turnaround. Fast, practical, good for first drafts that need human refinement.

The rest? Overpriced, underperforming, or too narrow in capability.

The market is consolidating fast. Most AI writing tools won't exist in 2 years.

What's your go-to AI writing tool?
